name: iCite_get_publications
description: Get citation metrics and research context for PubMed publications using NIH's iCite API. iCite provides evidence-based metrics including citation counts, relative citation ratios (RCR), approximate potential to translate (APT) scores for clinical translation, NIH percentile rankings, and research category flags (human/animal/molecular-cellular). Returns all available citations and the full list of citing PMIDs. Essential for evaluating scientific impact, identifying highly-cited papers, and assessing translational potential of biomedical research. Example: PMID 31510562 has citation_count=6, nih_percentile=29.0.

pmids.description: Comma-separated PubMed IDs to look up (e.g., '24453150,24453148,31510562'). Maximum ~100 PMIDs per request.

NCBI_API_KEY.purpose: Search PubMed and fetch citation metrics (iCite) and PubTator annotations.
NCBI_API_KEY.without: Works at 3 requests/sec without it; the key raises the limit to 10/sec.

name: iCite_search_publications
description: Search PubMed publications by query and get citation metrics from NIH's iCite API. Returns papers matching the search query with citation counts, NIH percentile rankings, approximate potential to translate (APT) scores, and research category flags. Useful for finding highly-cited papers in a specific topic area and evaluating their translational potential. Returns up to 1000 results sorted by citation count.

query.description: Search query for PubMed (e.g., 'BRCA1 cancer', 'COVID-19 vaccine efficacy', 'CRISPR gene editing')
